title: athyrium × bittyuense
intro: Athyrium × bittyuense, a hybrid fern species, is a cross between Athyrium yokosukaense and Athyrium filix-femina, known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium × bittyuense include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve.
